# Tiny shim component that exposes the generated version_gen.h to anyone
# who REQUIRES it. The header is generated by the top-level CMakeLists.txt's
# configure_file() step from VERSION (single source of truth) into
# include/version_gen.h BEFORE this component registers.
#
# To bump version: edit the top-level VERSION file. Nothing else.
idf_component_register(
    INCLUDE_DIRS "include"
)
